'''Iolu''' was a [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Akk Guard]] from [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] during the [[Summertime War]].

He had saved a [[Nick Rostu]]'s life once during fire-fight.

==Biography==
Near the end of the [[Summertime War]], he, the other [[Akk Guard]]s, and [[Kar Vastor]] faced off against [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Nick Rostu]] and the other [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces. During the [[Battle of Pelek Baw]] Iolu slaughtered many [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] with his [[vibroshield]]s. At the end, he faced Nick Rostu alone. Rostu shot his arm almost completely off after Iolu got his vibroshield lodged in a wall. Rostu then used [[Liane Trevval|Chalk's]] heavy weapon to finish the Akk Guard. Unfortunately for Rostu, Iolu's shield cut a wound in Rostu's abdomen before Iolu died.
